points.label: Admin article collection under the account panel
points.summary: New admin-only 'Article collection' button in the account panel's summary (right above 'Admin interface'). PASS: signed in as the admin account, tap the header's account button — the button row shows 'Article collection'; tapping it opens a view titled 'Article collection' with an intro paragraph (the 716-commits/93-features numbers, a working /pulse link) and TEN collapsible abstracts numbered 1–10 in Swedish; tapping an abstract expands its full multi-paragraph text and tapping again collapses it; '← Back' returns to the summary. FAIL: the button missing for the admin, fewer than ten items, an abstract that won't expand, or garbled/escaped HTML in the texts.

actions.text: Also worth a glance if convenient: any signed-in NON-admin account must NOT see the 'Article collection' button in its account panel.
